site.title: Zentangle Chou
site.tagline: Find Your Peace, One Stroke at a Time

manifesto.quoteEn: There are no mistakes, only opportunities.

demo.title: Live: Florz
demo.intro:
Hand the brush to time.
Scroll, and watch each cell grow stroke by stroke.

process.title: Three steps. One breath.
process.step1Desc: Draw a square. Frame the world.
process.step2Desc: Lightly pencil a line — that is the string.
process.step3Desc: In each cell, slowly fill in the pattern.

tile.ariaLabel: An animated Zentangle tile drawing in five canonical layers

eightBreaths.title: Eight Breaths
eightBreaths.subtitle: The Zentangle ritual: from gratitude to appreciation

step1.title: Gratitude & Breath
step1.desc: Before beginning, pause. Be grateful for this moment.

step2.title: Corner Dots
step2.desc: Place four pencil dots — the start of the boundary.

step3.title: Pencil Border
step3.desc: Connect the dots with a gentle, freehand edge.

step4.title: Pencil String
step4.desc: One free line, dividing the space into zones.

step5.title: Tangle
step5.desc: In each zone, slowly fill the pattern.

step6.title: Shade
step6.desc: Soft graphite shading lifts the drawing into depth.

step7.title: Initial
step7.desc: Tuck your mark into the pattern.

step8.title: Appreciate
step8.desc: Step back. Look at what you made without a plan.

patternIndex.title: Tangle dictionary
patternIndex.intro: Every pattern is a sentence rewritten many times.
